task_completion.description: Access the Back Office in Floreant POS using the provided PIN.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Floreant POS Back Office dashboard is visible, indicating successful login (often showing buttons like Admin, Reports, etc.).

task_completion.description: Open the Menu Usage (or Product Mix / Item Sales) report interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window, tab, or dialog specifically for the 'Menu Usage', 'Product Mix', or 'Item Sales' report is open within Floreant POS.

task_completion.description: Generate the report for the default period.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A preview of the generated report is visible on the screen, displaying tabular data related to menu item sales.

task_completion.description: Initiate the export of the generated report as a PDF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' file dialog is open, with the file type set to PDF or an export button being clicked.
The save dialog shows the file name 'menu_usage.pdf' and the destination folder as 'Desktop', or a file manager/desktop view shows the saved 'menu_usage.pdf' file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Floreant POS graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Floreant POS application windows being clicked and navigated, rather than terminal commands executing database queries.

integrity.description: The report was exported using the application's built-in export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save dialog originates from the Floreant POS application (typically a Java-based UI), not from a separate text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not create a fake or empty file to bypass the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing commands like 'touch /home/ga/Desktop/menu_usage.pdf' or 'echo > menu_usage.pdf'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected file path is /home/ga/Desktop/menu_usage.pdf. The file must be a valid PDF (application/pdf) and exceed 1000 bytes in size. The report is generated in Floreant POS. The report might be named 'Menu Usage', 'Product Mix', or 'Item Sales' depending on the exact version/menu.
